summary: Implemented code splitting, lazy loading, manual chunks, and React.memo. Main bundle reduced from 513KB to 252KB (51% reduction). 7 separate chunks created.
changes: React.lazy + Suspense for AIAssistant (21KB chunk), TaskEditModal (10KB), FilePreviewModal (3.4KB), TeamPanel (2.6KB), RemindersPanel (2.8KB)
Vite manualChunks: vendor-dnd (58KB), vendor-insforge (166KB) separated from main bundle
React.memo added to StatsCards and StatsPills components
Suspense fallbacks with Skeleton component for lazy-loaded panels
Conditional rendering for modals (only load when open)
bundleAfter: 251.94 KB main (77KB gzip) + 7 lazy chunks. No Vite warnings.
